detail: PO-001 — Fresh Foods Ltd · 15 lines · ₿45,000. Status → Created
Dispatched → WMS. Expected delivery registered at receiving dock.
POST /webhooks/wms/goods-receipt-confirmed — 847 units across 15 lines. PO status → FullyReceived
POST /webhooks/wms/purchase-order-put-away-confirmed — all goods shelved at Sloc.
PO-001 closed. Stock incremented in WMS inventory — ready for outbound picking.
WMS incremented available inventory for all received SKUs. Picker can now fulfill orders.
ORD-001 — Alice Johnson · Delivery · 5 items · ₿2,450. Status → Pending
Dispatched → WMS. Order registered for slot scheduling.
Pick task initiated. Status → PickStarted
Dispatched → WMS. Picker notified. Picker walks to Sloc assigned during PO put-away.
POST /webhooks/wms/pick-confirmed — 5/5 lines picked, no substitutions. Status → PickConfirmed
Dispatched → POS. Recalculation requested on actual picked quantities.
POST /webhooks/pos/recalculation-result — promo applied. Final total: ₿2,380 (was ₿2,450).
Order total updated to ₿2,380. pos_recalc_pending cleared.
1 package — TRK-2024-001, all 5 lines, VehicleType: Van
Dispatched → TMS. Package registered with TrackingId.
All packages sealed and ready for dispatch. Status → Packed
Dispatched → TMS. Vehicle dispatch scheduling triggered.
POST /webhooks/tms/package-dispatched — TRK-2024-001 out for delivery. Status → OutForDelivery
POST /webhooks/tms/package-delivered — TRK-2024-001 delivered to customer. Status → Delivered
Dispatched → POS. Invoice generation triggered.
Tax Invoice #INV-2024-001 · ₿2,380
Dispatched → POS. Payment link requested.
POST /webhooks/pos/payment-result — payment confirmed ₿2,380. Status → Paid
